HERO.HEADLINE: Preserving the Oral History of Post-Soviet Social Life
HERO.SUBHEADLINE: The Caucasus Memory Studies Center is dedicated to researching and documenting collective memory, social change, and historical narratives in the region.

PUBLICATIONS.TITLE: Featured Publications
PUBLICATIONS.DESCRIPTION: A collection of our latest and most significant research.

RESEARCHERS.DESCRIPTION: Meet the team leading our collective memory studies.

MISSION.TITLE: Our Mission
MISSION.PARAGRAPH_1: Memory studies in the Caucasus are vital both theoretically and practically, as the perception and interpretation of the past significantly influence the region's cultural and political processes. However, memory research in the region is still in its infancy.
MISSION.PARAGRAPH_2: In Georgia, as well as throughout the Caucasus, memory studies do not yet align with modern scientific trends. Therefore, it is crucial to apply modern paradigms to study memory and other pressing regional issues.

AFFILIATION.TITLE: Institutional Affiliation
AFFILIATION.DESCRIPTION: The Center for Memory Studies was founded in 2015 within the Faculty of Arts and Sciences at Ilia State University. The center focuses on both internal university research and externally funded research projects.

GOALS.TITLE: Goals and Objectives
GOALS.ITEM_1: Accumulate and utilize Western scientific experience and develop new theoretical paradigms to advance memory studies in Georgia and the region.
GOALS.ITEM_2: Foster close collaboration with memory studies researchers and scientific centers within and outside the Caucasus.
GOALS.ITEM_3: Implement memory studies into the educational process.
GOALS.ITEM_4: Create educational courses and programs in related fields (history, social sciences, political science, cultural studies).

ACTIVITIES.TITLE: Key Activities
ACTIVITIES.ITEM_1: Conducting fundamental research in the field of memory studies.
ACTIVITIES.ITEM_2: Organizing regional and international conferences, workshops, round tables, and meetings.
ACTIVITIES.ITEM_3: Engaging in publishing and translation activities.
